name: RunningTaskCount
definition: Number of tasks in RUNNING state for a service. Primary health signal — must equal DesiredTaskCount.
absence_means: Container Insights not enabled or no services in cluster

name: PendingTaskCount
definition: Number of tasks in PENDING state for a service. Sustained non-zero indicates placement failures or resource shortage.
absence_means: Container Insights not enabled or all tasks running

name: DesiredTaskCount
definition: Target number of running tasks for a service. Set by operator or auto-scaling policy.
absence_means: Container Insights not enabled

name: DeploymentCount
definition: Number of active deployments for a service. >1 means a deployment is in progress or stuck.
absence_means: Container Insights not enabled

name: RestartCount
definition: Cumulative container restart count. Rising slope indicates container crash loops or health check failures.
absence_means: No restarts (healthy) or Container Insights not enabled

name: TaskCount
definition: Total number of tasks running in the cluster (all services + standalone tasks).
absence_means: Container Insights not enabled

name: ServiceCount
definition: Number of services in the cluster.
absence_means: Container Insights not enabled

name: ContainerInstanceCount
definition: Number of EC2 container instances registered with the cluster. EC2 launch type only.
absence_means: EC2 launch type not used or Container Insights not enabled

name: CPUUtilization
definition: Percentage of CPU units in use. Service-level available for Fargate+EC2. Cluster-level available for EC2 only. Can exceed 100% on EC2 if no hard CPU limit set.
absence_means: No tasks running in service/cluster

name: MemoryUtilization
definition: Percentage of memory in use. Service-level available for Fargate+EC2. Cluster-level available for EC2 only. Approaching 100% = OOM kill risk.
absence_means: No tasks running in service/cluster

name: CpuUtilized
definition: CPU units used by tasks. Absolute value (not percentage). Useful alongside CpuReserved for utilization ratio.
absence_means: Container Insights not enabled or no tasks running

name: CpuReserved
definition: CPU units reserved by tasks. Absolute value. Denominator for CPU utilization ratio.
absence_means: Container Insights not enabled or no tasks running

name: MemoryUtilized
definition: Memory in MiB used by tasks. Absolute value. Compare with MemoryReserved to compute utilization.
absence_means: Container Insights not enabled or no tasks running

name: MemoryReserved
definition: Memory in MiB reserved by tasks. Absolute value. Denominator for memory utilization ratio.
absence_means: Container Insights not enabled or no tasks running

name: CPUReservation
definition: Percentage of total registered CPU units reserved by running tasks. EC2 launch type only. NOT FOUND in Tsuga — likely Fargate-only account.
absence_means: EC2 launch type not used or no tasks running

name: MemoryReservation
definition: Percentage of total registered memory reserved by running tasks. EC2 launch type only. NOT FOUND in Tsuga — likely Fargate-only account.
absence_means: EC2 launch type not used or no tasks running

name: GPUReservation
definition: Percentage of total available GPUs reserved by running tasks. EC2 launch type with GPU instances only. NOT FOUND in Tsuga.
absence_means: EC2 launch type not used or no GPU instances

name: NetworkRxBytes
definition: Bytes received per second by tasks. Available only for awsvpc and bridge network modes. Reported as a rate (Bytes/Second).
absence_means: Network mode does not support metric or Container Insights not enabled

name: NetworkTxBytes
definition: Bytes transmitted per second by tasks. Available only for awsvpc and bridge network modes. Reported as a rate (Bytes/Second).
absence_means: Network mode does not support metric or Container Insights not enabled

name: StorageReadBytes
definition: Bytes read from storage devices by tasks.
absence_means: No storage reads or Container Insights not enabled

name: StorageWriteBytes
definition: Bytes written to storage devices by tasks.
absence_means: No storage writes or Container Insights not enabled

name: EphemeralStorageReserved
definition: Ephemeral storage in GB reserved for Fargate tasks. Fargate Linux platform 1.4.0+ only.
absence_means: Not Fargate or platform version < 1.4.0 or Container Insights not enabled

name: EphemeralStorageUtilized
definition: Ephemeral storage in GB used by Fargate tasks. Fargate Linux platform 1.4.0+ only.
absence_means: Not Fargate or platform version < 1.4.0 or Container Insights not enabled

name: EBSFilesystemUtilization
definition: Percentage of EBS filesystem used. NOT FOUND in Tsuga — no EBS volumes attached to tasks in this account.
absence_means: No EBS volumes attached to tasks

name: RequestCount
definition: Inbound requests processed by Service Connect proxies. Requires appProtocol in port mapping. Service Connect only.
absence_means: Service Connect not configured or appProtocol not set

name: ProcessedBytes
definition: Inbound bytes processed by Service Connect proxies. Service Connect only.
absence_means: Service Connect not configured

name: ActiveConnectionCount
definition: Number of concurrent active connections to Service Connect proxies. Service Connect only.
absence_means: Service Connect not configured

name: NewConnectionCount
definition: New connections established via Service Connect proxies. Service Connect only.
absence_means: Service Connect not configured

name: HTTPCode_Target_2XX_Count
definition: HTTP 2xx (success) responses from Service Connect targets.
absence_means: Service Connect not configured or appProtocol not set

name: HTTPCode_Target_3XX_Count
definition: HTTP 3xx (redirect) responses from Service Connect targets. NOT FOUND in Tsuga — no 3xx responses in this account.
absence_means: Service Connect not configured or no 3xx responses

name: HTTPCode_Target_4XX_Count
definition: HTTP 4xx (client error) responses from Service Connect targets. NOT FOUND in Tsuga — no 4xx responses in this account.
absence_means: Service Connect not configured or no 4xx responses

name: HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count
definition: HTTP 5xx (server error) responses from Service Connect targets. NOT FOUND in Tsuga — no 5xx responses in this account.
absence_means: Service Connect not configured or no 5xx responses

name: TargetResponseTime
definition: Latency from Service Connect proxy to target response. Supports average min max. Service Connect only.
absence_means: Service Connect not configured

name: TargetProcessedBytes
definition: Bytes processed by Service Connect proxies toward targets. Service Connect only.
absence_means: Service Connect not configured

name: RequestCountPerTarget
definition: Average requests per target for Service Connect. Useful for per-instance scaling decisions.
absence_means: Service Connect not configured

name: ClientTLSNegotiationErrorCount
definition: TLS connection failures on the client side of Service Connect. NOT FOUND in Tsuga — TLS not configured.
absence_means: Service Connect TLS not configured

name: TargetTLSNegotiationErrorCount
definition: TLS failures for target connections. NOT FOUND in Tsuga — TLS not configured.
absence_means: Service Connect TLS not configured

name: GrpcRequestCount
definition: gRPC inbound requests processed by Service Connect. Requires appProtocol: GRPC. Service Connect only.
absence_means: Service Connect not configured or appProtocol not GRPC

name: TaskSetCount
definition: Number of task sets in a service. Relevant for external deployment controllers.
absence_means: Container Insights not enabled or using rolling deployment (not external)

name: EBSFilesystemSize
definition: Total EBS filesystem size in GB. NOT FOUND in Tsuga — no EBS volumes attached.
absence_means: No EBS volumes attached or Container Insights not enabled

name: EBSFilesystemUtilized
definition: EBS filesystem used in GB. NOT FOUND in Tsuga — no EBS volumes attached.
absence_means: No EBS volumes attached or Container Insights not enabled

name: ContainerCpuUtilization
definition: UNEXPECTED — Container-level CPU utilization percentage. Enhanced Observability only.
absence_means: Enhanced Observability not enabled
cardinality_footguns: containername x taskid can be high cardinality; prefer containername alone

name: ContainerMemoryUtilization
definition: UNEXPECTED — Container-level memory utilization percentage. Enhanced Observability only.
absence_means: Enhanced Observability not enabled
cardinality_footguns: containername x taskid can be high cardinality; prefer containername alone

name: UnHealthyContainerHealthStatus
definition: UNEXPECTED — Container health check status. 1=UNHEALTHY 0=HEALTHY. Enhanced Observability only. Requires health check in task definition.
absence_means: Enhanced Observability not enabled or health check not configured

name: TaskCpuUtilization
definition: UNEXPECTED — Task-level CPU utilization percentage. Enhanced Observability only.
absence_means: Enhanced Observability not enabled

name: TaskMemoryUtilization
definition: UNEXPECTED — Task-level memory utilization percentage. Enhanced Observability only.
absence_means: Enhanced Observability not enabled

name: TaskEphemeralStorageUtilization
definition: UNEXPECTED — Task-level ephemeral storage utilization percentage. Enhanced Observability only. Fargate only.
absence_means: Enhanced Observability not enabled or not Fargate

name: NOT_APPLICABLE
definition: ECS does not have dedicated cost metrics. Cost is driven by Fargate vCPU/memory-seconds and EC2 instance hours. Proxy signals: CpuUtilized vs CpuReserved (over-provisioning) and RunningTaskCount (scale). Use AWS Cost Explorer for actual cost data.
absence_means: N/A
